basic_details.job_title: Madhabdev University Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Madhabdev University has officially announced the Recruitment 2026 notification for 21 teaching vacancies, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts. Candidates possessing the required qualifications as per UGC norms are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can submit their offline applications on or before 02 July 2026. Check the official notification for post-wise eligibility criteria, pay scale, selection process, and application procedure.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post and any applicable age relaxations.

qualification.details: Professor: As per UGC norms Associate Professor: As per UGC norms Assistant Professor: As per UGC norms

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: Rs.1,44,200.00-2,18,200.00; Associate Professor: Rs.1,31,400.00-2,17,100.00; Assistant Professor: Rs.57,700.00-1,82,400.00

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Madhabdev University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.madhabdevuniversity.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Madhabdev University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Madhabdev University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Madhabdev University Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Madhabdev University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.madhabdevuniversity.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Madhabdev University recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Madhabdev University recruitment is 02 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: A total of 21 vacancies are available for the posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor in Madhabdev University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for all the posts is as per UGC norms. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The salary ranges are: Professor: Rs.1,44,200.00-2,18,200.00; Associate Professor: Rs.1,31,400.00-2,17,100.00; Assistant Professor: Rs.57,700.00-1,82,400.00.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 2000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST category candidates is Rs. 1500.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening by a Screening Committee followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Madhabdev University located?
faq.answer: Madhabdev University is located in Narayanpur, Assam, with the pincode 784164.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the official website of Madhabdev University, www.madhabdevuniversity.ac.in, and the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
